indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a flat surface at sitting height makes it impossible to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: upholstered chairs without desk
indicators.rationale: Soft lounge chairs without an adjacent surface force an uncomfortable, non-ergonomic posture for laptop use.

indicators.name: high-traffic restaurant layout
indicators.rationale: The restaurant layout is designed for social dining, not focused solo work.

indicators.name: ambient lighting
indicators.rationale: Ambient lighting is not suitable for screen work and may cause screen glare.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is highly unsuitable for focused solo computer work. The lack of a flat work surface, ergonomic seating, and a high-traffic restaurant layout make it impossible to set up a productive workstation. The ambient lighting is also not suitable for screen work.
